products.name: Essential Skin Nuder Long Wear Cushion — 21 Light
products.title: Essential Skin Nuder Long Wear Cushion
products.description: A long-wear cushion with a soft satin finish. Refill included.
products.bodyHtml: A long-wear cushion with a soft satin finish. Refill included.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: Built by a working artist for working skin. The finish reads as skin under daylight and stage light, and a refill is included so the case becomes a long-term object rather than a single use.
products.howToUse: Press the puff onto the cushion, then tap onto the centre of the face and blend outward. Layer where needed. Snap in the refill once the original runs out.

products.name: Etsere Melacare Crème
products.title: Etsere Melacare Crème
products.description: A brightening cream with melanin-care actives. 50 ml.
products.bodyHtml: A brightening cream with melanin-care actives. 50 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A quiet, sculptural jar with a focused brief: smooth dry-looking skin, brighten tone, and leave a healthy, glowing finish.
products.howToUse: After serum, scoop a pea-sized amount and press evenly across the face morning and night.

products.name: Etsere Melatonic Ampoule
products.title: Etsere Melatonic Ampoule
products.description: A concentrated brightening ampoule for tone correction. 30 ml.
products.bodyHtml: A concentrated brightening ampoule for tone correction. 30 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A quiet, sculptural ampoule with a focused brief: brighten dark, dull-looking skin and leave a healthy, glowing finish.
products.howToUse: After toner, dispense a small amount and press evenly across the face morning and night. Follow with cream.

products.name: Eye & Face Serum
products.title: Eye & Face Serum
products.description: A slow-aging serum for eye and face. 30 ml.
products.bodyHtml: A slow-aging serum for eye and face. 30 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A single serum that does double duty across the eye area and the face, with a slow-aging brief focused on lift, elasticity, and the wrinkle barrier.
products.howToUse: Dispense one to two pumps. Press across the face and gently pat around the eye area morning and night.

products.name: Goldrella Peptide 28 Anti-Melanin Essence
products.title: Goldrella Peptide 28 Anti-Melanin Essence
products.description: A brightening essence with Goldrella Peptide. 150 ml.
products.bodyHtml: A brightening essence with Goldrella Peptide. 150 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A focused brightening essence built around Goldrella Peptide and Idebenonesome, with a clinical brief: tone, turnover, elasticity.
products.howToUse: After toner, dispense a small amount and press evenly across the face morning and night. Follow with cream.

products.name: Green Tomato Cream

products.name: Homme Black Active 2P Set
products.title: Homme Black Active 2P Set
products.description: A two-step men's ritual: Toner 125 ml and Emulsion 110 ml.
products.bodyHtml: A two-step men's ritual: Toner 125 ml and Emulsion 110 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: HERA's quiet, prestige men's ritual paired in a single set: a refining toner and a comforting emulsion in dark, weighted glass.
products.howToUse: Morning and night after cleansing, smooth the toner across the face, then follow with the emulsion.

products.name: Lift PDRN Neck Patch
products.title: Lift PDRN Neck Patch
products.description: A lifting neck patch with DW-EGF, PDRN, and peptide complex. 4 sheets.
products.bodyHtml: A lifting neck patch with DW-EGF, PDRN, and peptide complex. 4 sheets.
products.howToUse: After cleansing and toning, apply a patch to the neck area. Leave on for 20 to 30 minutes, then gently pat any remaining essence into the skin.

products.name: Micro-Active Powder Wash
products.title: Micro-Active Powder Wash
products.description: A naturally fermented enzyme powder cleanser for soft, refined skin.
products.bodyHtml: A naturally fermented enzyme powder cleanser for soft, refined skin.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A daily-suitable enzyme cleanser that refines texture without stripping. The fermented base reads gentle on reactive skin.
products.howToUse: Tip a small amount into wet palms. Build a foam, massage onto damp skin for thirty seconds, rinse with lukewarm water.

products.name: Mood Painting Lip and Cheek Palette — Mood 01 Pink

products.description: A multi-use cream palette for cheeks and lips, in tied-together tones.
products.bodyHtml: A multi-use cream palette for cheeks and lips, in tied-together tones.
products.howToUse: Tap a fingertip or small brush into a single shade. Press onto the apples of the cheeks, then layer the same tone onto the lips for a tied-together finish.

products.name: Moodwear Blur Lipstick — 01 Drift
products.title: Moodwear Blur Lipstick
products.description: A soft-focus matte lipstick with a lived-in blur finish.
products.bodyHtml: A soft-focus matte lipstick with a lived-in blur finish.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A matte that reads soft rather than dry. The blurred finish gives weight and edge without the flatness most matte bullets settle into.
products.howToUse: Apply directly from the bullet, starting at the centre of the lip and pressing out. For a softer edge, tap out with a fingertip.

products.title: Rouge Classy

products.name: Royal Regina Energetic Special Set
products.title: Royal Regina Energetic Special Set
products.description: The Royal Regina duo: Serum 30 ml and Cream 50 ml, with travel companions.
products.bodyHtml: The Royal Regina duo: Serum 30 ml and Cream 50 ml, with travel companions.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: The Royal Regina line distilled into a two-step ritual. A heritage skincare set with the kind of object weight and finish that justifies a slow shelf.
products.howToUse: After cleansing and toning, press the Energetic Repair Serum across the face, then seal with the Royal Regina Cream morning and night.

products.bodyHtml: A daily exfoliating cleanser with Rice Nuruk Ferment, PHA and Ceramide. 120 g.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A daily exfoliating cleanser from su:m37°'s naturally fermented line, built around Rice Nuruk Ferment with PHA and Ceramide.

products.name: Signature Silt Vale Crème

products.bodyHtml: A nourishing cream with mineral-rich silt extract. 50 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A sculptural dark-tube cream built around Centella Asiatica from a secluded Kerala jungle and Madecassoside, for skin that feels clear and elastic.
products.howToUse: After serum, dispense a small amount and press evenly across the face morning and night.

products.name: Skin Nuder Foundation — Light

products.bodyHtml: A lightweight liquid foundation for a sheer, skin-true finish. 30 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: An iF Design Award winning bottle around a base built by a working artist. The finish reads as skin rather than coverage, which is the harder thing to engineer.

products.bodyHtml: A protective base prep that smooths skin under makeup. 25 ml.
products.whyItMadeTheEdit: A base prep that reads as skincare, with two distinct finishes: a soft pearled glow and a quiet velvet matte. Designed to live under base, not on top of it.
